justification: The privacy policy states that precise location data from the device is only processed with user consent (L0265). Since the scenario specifies the user has not granted device or browser location permissions, Gemini may not collect or use the precise device location without explicit permission.

source_excerpts.quote: Mit Ihrer Erlaubnis verarbeiten die Gemini-Apps auch genaue Standortdaten von Ihrem Gerät.
